tasks.description: Review the `tests/verify_iso_size.sh` script. Replace repeated external subprocess calls (like `grep`) with native bash logic (like substring matching) wherever possible to eliminate fork/exec overhead.
Ensure any error messages emitted by `tests/verify_iso_size.sh` are multi-line and feature a clear '💡 How to fix:' block with actionable, bulleted steps to reduce developer cognitive load on failure.

Audit all systemd `.service` files under `airootfs/etc/systemd/system/` and implement strict systemd service sandboxing (e.g., `ProtectSystem=strict`, `NoNewPrivileges=yes`, `PrivateTmp=yes`) to limit root privileges and reduce the attack surface.
